data.title: Global report on Hyperscale Data Center Market 2025-2030 shows 9.58% CAGR growth, with 190% increase in IT investment by 2024.
data.description: Dublin, The global hyperscale data center market is projected to experience a growth rate of 9.58% from 2024 to 2030, as per an analysis presented in the "Global Hyperscale Data Center Market Landscape 2025-2030" report available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market has shown remarkable progress in IT infrastructure investment, with an expected absolute growth rate of approximately 190% from 2021 to 2024. The hyperscale data center market segmentation insights reveal a promising trend in the industry's expansion.

data.title: Everyday People Financial Corp. and XTM Inc. form agreement to integrate Canadian payments operation on Oct 22, 2025.
data.description: Everyday People Financial Corp (EPF) and XTM Inc. (XTM) have signed a Management Services and Program Management Agreement on October 22, 2025. EPF, listed on TSX-V as EPF and OTCQB as EPFCF, and XTM, listed as PAID on CSE, will be collaborating through a subsidiary named Everyday People Payments Inc. (Everyday Payments). This agreement involves EPF taking over operational management, compliance oversight, and technology administration.

data.title: Former President Trump pardons Binance's Changpeng Zhao after serving time for money laundering. #breakingnews #pardon
data.description: In a surprising development, ex-President Donald Trump has granted a pardon to Changpeng Zhao, the creator of Binance, following his incarceration for money laundering accusations.

data.title: 83 people arrested in major Interpol operation targeting crypto terrorist financing and cybercrime in Africa. Over $260M in fiat and crypto flagged, with $600K seized.
data.description: Operation Catalyst identified $260 million in fiat currency and cryptocurrency that raised suspicions. Authorities have managed to seize around $600,000 so far as part of the operation.

data.title: Canopy Growth to report Q2 FY2026 results on Nov 7, 2025. Webcast with CEO & CFO at 10 AM ET. (TSX:WEED, NASDAQ:CGC)
data.description: In Smiths Falls, Ontario, Canopy Growth Corporation (TSX:WEED, NASDAQ:CGC) will reveal its financial performance for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026 concluding on September 30, 2025, on November 7, 2025, before market opening. The company will conduct an audio webcast featuring Luc Mongeau, CEO, and Tom Stewart, CFO, at 10 AM Eastern Time on the same day following the financial results announcement.

data.title: Schneider Electric supports transition to 800 VDC power systems for high-density rack systems in data centers.
data.description: A company in Ontario, Schneider Electric, a key player in the digital transformation of energy management and automation, has affirmed its dedication to aiding the shift to 800 VDC power architectures in the industry. These architectures are vital for new high-density rack systems in upcoming data centers. With the industry moving towards higher power densities and improved efficiency, Schneider Electric is actively developing solutions to meet these demands.

data.title: Ryan named as one of the best places to work in Kansas City in 2025 by Kansas City Business Journal for the 5th year.
data.description: In Kansas City, Ryan, a top global tax services and software provider, has been recognized as one of the Best Places to Work in the city in 2025 for the fifth year in a row by the Kansas City Business Journal. This distinction highlights the dedication and teamwork of the Kansas City team, as stated by Ginny B. Kissling, President Americas and Chief Operating Officer. The team's commitment to excellence has resulted in this achievement, showcasing their passion and collaboration. Ryan continues to prioritize its people, investing in their growth and success.

data.title: AKVA group ASA has started buying back up to 60,000 of its own shares for employee share program.
data.description: On 23 September 2025, AKVA Group ASA disclosed its plan to repurchase a maximum of 60,000 of its own shares. The buyback is intended for utilization in the company's employee share program.

data.title: ECARX launches Geely Galaxy EX5 in the UK with Antora® and Cloudpeak® solutions, expanding into core European markets.
data.description: Today in London, ECARX Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: ECX) disclosed plans to utilize its AI Enhanced Antora ® 1000 computing platform and Cloudpeak ® cross-domain software stack for the introduction of the Geely Galaxy EX5 in the United Kingdom under the theme “Intelligent Everyday”. This launch signifies the beginning of widespread distribution of these technologies in key European markets subsequent to their introduction in 33 countries spanning Southeast Europe, South America, Southeast Asia, and Oceania. The milestone highlights the broad acceptance of the Antora series as a sophisticated automotive intelligent solution on a global scale.

data.title: September's delayed CPI may reveal impact of Trump's tariffs on imported goods, affecting a range of products.
data.description: The release of the September Consumer Price Index, which was delayed due to the government shutdown, could potentially demonstrate the impact of President Trump's tariffs on numerous imported goods. The index provides a gauge of inflation by tracking the prices of various consumer goods and services. This delay has caused anticipation as analysts await to see if the tariffs have influenced the index. The Consumer Price Index typically serves as an important indicator of the overall economic climate.

data.title: Origin Agritech secures new licenses for seed production and GMO operations, enhancing market presence. Company: Origin Agritech Ltd. (NASDAQ: SEED) in Beijing. (Characters: 119)
data.description: Company Origin Agritech Ltd. (NASDAQ: SEED) unveiled strategic restructuring plans in Beijing on October 24, 2025, aimed at enhancing its market presence and operational capacities. The Chinese agricultural tech giant is set to expand its reach and efficiency as a result.

data.title: Dallas Area Rapid Transit (DART) launches Silver Line rail service, a 26-mile route connecting various communities in North Texas; service begins Oct. 25, 2025, offering frequent trips 4 a.m. to 1 a.m. daily, and eco-friendly Stadler trains.
data.description: Dallas Area Rapid Transit (DART) is launching the Silver Line regional rail service on October 25, 2025, spanning over 26 miles and connecting Plano, Richardson, Dallas, Addison, Carrollton, Coppell, Grapevine, and DFW International Airport. The service will run every 30 minutes during weekday peak hours and every 60 minutes off-peak and on weekends, from 4 a.m. to 1 a.m. daily. The Silver Line will offer transfers to DART Light Rail, bus routes, DFW terminals, and Trinity Metro TexRail. This investment aims to reduce congestion, improve mobility, and connect residents to jobs and education opportunities in North Texas. The stations are designed with input from local cities, focusing on accessibility and reflecting community feedback.
